sub_topic: Properties of the Rectangle, Square and Rhombus
question_text: Which statement is always true for a square?
option_a: It is both a rectangle and a rhombus
option_b: It has exactly one pair of parallel sides
explanation: A square has four right angles and four equal sides, so it belongs to both families.
